name: TEGNA Inc.
description: TEGNA Inc. is a prominent media company that operates a diverse portfolio of television stations and digital media properties across the United States. Headquartered in McLean, Virginia, the company provides local news, information, and entertainment content to audiences through linear television, streaming platforms, and digital channels. TEGNA connects advertisers with locally-motivated audiences by leveraging its extensive network of broadcast stations and advanced marketing solutions. Through its commitment to high-quality journalism and innovative digital strategies, TEGNA serves as a vital resource for communities while driving business objectives for its clients across various media platforms.
